title: QatarEnergy's liquefied natural gas production facilities can be seen in Ras Laffan Industrial City, Qatar. (File/Reuters)

snapshot.title: Explosion as Qatar restarts gas export terminal hurts 54 and leaves 18 missing
snapshot.description: DUBAI: An explosion tore through Qatar’s key natural gas export terminal Sunday night as workers tried to resume operations there after Iran bombed it during the war, causing a fire that hurt at least 54 people as another 18 were still missing hours later. The blast at the Ras Laffan industrial area could cause further chaos in global energy markets, particularly as Qatar
snapshot.author: AP
snapshot.pageTitle: Explosion as Qatar restarts gas export terminal hurts 54 and leaves 18 missing | Arab News
